chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Etiquettes of Judgment

text: 3237 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ أَنْصَفَ اَلنَّاسَ مِنْ نَفْسِهِ رُضِيَ بِهِ حَكَماً لِغَيْرِهِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3237 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever treats people with fairness from himself is accepted as a judge for others."
